heading: Personnel
label: 9103 Personnel
text: The Commission of Fine Arts has a secretary and other assistance the Commission authorizes. The secretary is the executive officer of the Commission.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)910340:104 (last sentence words before comma).(last sentence words before comma), .May 17, 1910, ch. 243, § 136 Stat. 37140:105.1 [sic] (8th complete par. on p. 728 (less appropriations)), .June 25, 1910, ch. 38436 Stat. 728The text of 40:105 (related to officer in charge of public buildings and grounds) is omitted as obsolete.
